feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Metrology of Complexity and Implications for the Study of the Emergence of Life
entry.content:
Authors: S Imari Walker - arXiv e-prints, 2026

Abstract: One of the longest standing open problems in science is how life arises from non- living matter. If it is possible to measure this transition in the lab, then it might be possible to understand the physical mechanisms by which the emergence of life ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

Alert: Sara Imari Walker (author alert)

entry.title: Worlds Next Door. IV. Mapping the Late Stages of Giant Planet Evolution with a Precise Dynamical Mass and Luminosity for $\epsilon $ Ind Ab
entry.content:
Authors: A Sanghi, W Thompson, J Mang, J Xuan, D Mawet... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: We present new JWST/NIRCam 4-5$\mu $ m (F410M, F430M) and JWST/MIRI 18- 25$\mu $ m (F1800W, F2100W, F2550W) imaging detections of the nearby (3.6 pc) cold (275 K) gas giant exoplanet $\epsilon $ Ind Ab. The F2550W detection of ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Björn Benneke (author alert)

entry.title: Cloudy Extrasolar Skies in the JWST Era and their Dependence on Atmospheric Properties
entry.content:
Authors: G Suarez, J Faherty, S Metchev, A Burgasser, J Vos... - ... Society Meeting Abstracts, 2026

Abstract: Dust clouds in extrasolar atmospheres shape the emergent spectra of gas giant planets and brown dwarfs. Therefore, our understanding of these objects depends on our knowledge of silicate clouds, which have their main spectral signature in the ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Adam J. Burgasser (author alert)

entry.title: Competitive interactions shape mammalian brain network dynamics and computation
entry.content:
Authors: AI Luppi, Y Sanz Perl, J Vohryzek, H Ali, PAM Mediano... - Nature Neuroscience, 2026

Abstract: How does brain network architecture balance cooperation and competition between distributed circuits? Here we use computational whole-brain modeling to examine the dynamical and computational relevance of cooperative and competitive ...

Tags: brain, Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: Fernando E. Rosas (author alert)

entry.title: Mind the gaps: The fraught road to quantum advantage
entry.content:
Authors: JP J. Eisert

Journal: 2025

Alert: Jens Eisert (author alert)

entry.title: Unifying communication paradigms in measurement-based delegated quantum computing
entry.content:
Authors: F Wiesner, J Eisert, A Pappa - ACM Transactions on Quantum Computing, 2026

Abstract: Delegated quantum computing (DQC) allows clients with low quantum capabilities to outsource computations to a server hosting a quantum computer. This process is often envisioned within the measurement-based quantum computing framework, as it ...

Alert: Jens Eisert (author alert)

entry.title: Trans-acting Determinants of Gene Expression: Effects of Transcription Factor Affinity, Abundance, and Localization
entry.content:
Authors: M López-Malo, SJ Maerkl - bioRxiv, 2026

Abstract: Transcription factors (TFs) regulate gene expression by binding cis-regulatory DNA elements, yet how trans-regulatory characteristics such as TF affinity, concentration, and localization interact with cis-regulatory elements remains largely unclear. We ...

Alert: Sebastian J. Maerkl (author alert)

entry.title: Operational bounds and diagnostics for coherence in energy transfer
entry.content:
Authors: J Liebert, GD Scholes - arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.09748, 2026

Abstract: Excitation energy transfer in light-harvesting aggregates is highly efficient, yet whether quantum coherence plays an operational role in transport remains debated. A central challenge is that coherence is usually inferred from spectroscopic ...

Alert: Gregory Scholes (author alert)

entry.title: Exploring Excited State Proton Transfer Dynamics upon Ultraviolet Excitation
entry.content:
Authors: N Kaul, A Benny, V Petropoulos, M Maj, G Cerullo... - The Journal of Physical ..., 2026

Abstract: Excited state intramolecular proton transfer (ESIPT) has been investigated in two prototypical systems─ salicylaldehyde azine (SAA) and 1, 5- dihydroxyanthraquinone (DHAQ)─ using transient absorption spectroscopy upon ...

Alert: Gregory Scholes (author alert)

entry.title: AI or Human? Exploring the Effects of User Awareness in Conversational Dynamics with Virtual Avatars
entry.content:
Authors: SE Kober, S Streit, G Wood - Computers in Human Behavior, 2026

Abstract: Abstract With advancements in Large Language Models, AI chatbots are now widely used, offering near-human-like interactions. This study examines the emotional and psychological impacts of AI in communication, particularly when paired with human ...

Alert: Silvia Kober (author alert)
